description: Legal document. Dated: Thursday, 29 Adar 5539 AM (=Ṣafar 1193 AH), which is 1779 CE. Avraham Fayrūz b. Eliyyahu Fayrūz known as Shuwaykh makes arrangements for the inheritance of his late wife Marḥaba bt. Naḥum Kohen known as Ḥāṭūm, a sum of 21 Abū Ṭāqa riyals. A portion of it is distributed amongst his sons Eliyyahu, Faraj, and Sulaymān according to a specified schedule. Aharon ha-Levi's signature includes an alternative name that is unclear and perhaps multiple words (compare with Yevr. II A 1285 – PGPID 27499). In the latter shelfmark, the same man is likely the father of the bride Sukar bt. Aharon ha-Levi.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
